T0189.title: Card Reverse Lookup
T0189.definition: In illicit data trading, a type of record lookup service where a bank card number is used to reverse-lookup the account holder's name, national ID number, and registered phone number.
T0189.description: In illicit data trading, a type of record lookup service where a bank card number is used to reverse-lookup the account holder's name, national ID number, and registered phone number.
